Subject: Systems
Question: When we run the below function on a single core machine - #include <stdbool.h>  int main() { while (true); return 0; } Which of the following is an incorrect consequence
Answer: The System will be unresponsive because of the minimal while True statement and system being a single core, CPU will be stuck in the execution loop of while True.
A: The CPU will context switch to this process once the process is initiated.
B: The System will be unresponsive because of the minimal while True statement and system being a single core, CPU will be stuck in the execution loop of while True.
C: The above program will continue to run on the system forever, until manually stopped.

Subject: Systems
Question: In a system with 5 nodes(identical servers), during the election: Node A votes for itself. Node B votes for itself. Node C votes for Node D. Node D votes for Node A. Node E votes for Node B. Which of the following is the most likely outcome? a. Node A will be elected as the leader because it got more votes than any other node. b. The system will fail to elect a leader since no node received enough votes. c. Node B will be elected as the leader since it also received a vote from Node E. d. The system will automatically retry the election process until a majority is reached.

Question: Five pirates have found a treasure chest containing 20 gold coins. The pirates decide to distribute the coins as follows: The first pirate demands at least 3 coins. The second pirate demands at least 5 coins. The third, fourth, and fifth pirates can receive any number of coins (including zero), but all three pirates must get same number of coins. How many distinct ways can the gold coins be distributed among the five pirates?

The wedge is on a frictionless surface. Calculate the maximum displacement of the inclined plane?(g = 10 m/s^2)
